ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TV channel */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV channel (e.g., Sports, News) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the channel's logo image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the channel */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the channel */,
  "is_hd" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the channel is available in high definition */,
  "is_dvr" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether DVR is supported for the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the channel's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the streaming service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the streaming service */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing of the streaming service */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the service's logo image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the service is available */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* Languages supported by the service */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the service is available internationally */,
  "customer_support" TEXT /* Contact information for customer support */,
  "trial_period" TEXT /* Length of the free trial period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel availability record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV channel */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming service */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the channel is available on the service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the channel became available on the service */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the channel will no longer be available on the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the availability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the availability record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_availability_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES streaming_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_availability_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV channel */,
  "preference_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's preference for the channel (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, content provider) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content distribution record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV channel */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming service */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was distributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the distribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_distribution_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_distribution_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES streaming_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming service */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_features_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES streaming_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV channel */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the channel */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the channel */,
  "view_duration" REAL /* Average view duration for the channel */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on user interactions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_analytics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming service */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers */,
  "average_view_time" REAL /* Average view time per user */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate of subscribers */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_analytics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES streaming_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended streaming service */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES streaming_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
